content: وَطّي وَهَتّ لِلريموت مِن تَحتِ اِلطَرَبيزَة، لَو سَمَحت

transcriptions.arabizi: watti wa hatt|l|iilreemoot min taht iltarabeeza, law samaht

relationships: eng:bend down and get the remote from under the table, please﹖
